protein_name: Acts as a RAC1 guanine nucleotide exchange factor (GEF). Ubiquitous. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: GTPase activator activity; guanyl-nucleotide exchange factor activity; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: apoptotic process; JNK cascade; lamellipodium assembly
